title: [CI:DOCS] Add remaining release notes for v4.5.0-RC2
body:
The other half of the release notes for v4.5.0

```release-note
NONE
```

@ashley-cui @vrothberg @rhatdan Wondering if we should add a dedicated section for Quadlet release notes?

> @ashley-cui @vrothberg @rhatdan Wondering if we should add a dedicated section for Quadlet release notes?

That makes sense to me

Definitely a separate quadlet section.

We might want to also add a kubernetes section.
@cevich Any idea what's going on with Cirrus here? Total Success seems hung?
Looks green to me.  That's one of the few container-based tasks, perhaps there was some scheduling delay.  This is the only report I've heard of this, so hopefully was just a one-off.
